highlights.text: We got this right off the bat yesterday and I wrote in my Friday 4pm newsletter preparing readers for this: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins again on the fail of 5777….
Below there, possible options include a failed breakdown of today’s low.
This is important as in this newsletter I spent 80% of the time talking about my core setup: The Failed Breakdown, yesterday we got a real breakdown and in downtrends, these are your best friend.
I wrote yesterday: “ 5739 was a key support today, and it may have 1 bid left in it, but risky.
